chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1920 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Ghulam Raza Abro, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6, while learned AAG files statements / comments on behalf of Respondents 3 and 5, which are taken on record. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the case arising out of FIR No.235 of 2025 under Sections 379, 435, 447, 506/2, 148 and 149 PPC registered with Police Station, Tando Masti Khan, District Khairpur Mirs, the quashment thereof has been sought from this Court, has now been challaned in the Court of law, therefore, under instructions, he does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the petitioner will approach the competent Court of law / trial Court for appropriate relief provided under the law, which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
